bodyParagraphs: According to CPCB data, India generates over 1.01 million metric tonnes of e-waste annually, with Kerala contributing approximately 60,000 tonnes. Our {keyword} process ensures that {percentage}% of material is recovered and zero enters landfill.

The E-Waste Management Rules 2022 place explicit obligations on bulk consumers — any business in {city} that purchases electronics for commercial use. {keyword} must be documented with Form-6 manifests from an authorised recycler.
Data security during {keyword} is governed by two complementary frameworks: the NIST 800-88 standard for technical data sanitisation, and the DPDP Act 2023 for legal accountability. We satisfy both.
Our {keyword} facility in Thrippunithura processes over 5 tonnes of e-waste weekly, employing a team of 24 certified technicians using state-of-the-art separation and recovery equipment.

When evaluating {keyword} providers, the most critical document to request is the KSPCB authorisation certificate. Recyclers without this certificate are operating illegally under Kerala's environmental laws.

The circular economy benefits of proper {keyword} are substantial: every tonne of properly recycled e-waste recovers approximately 200g of gold, 1.5kg of silver, 100kg of copper, and 40kg of aluminium.

Corporate clients across {city}'s {area} choose our {keyword} service for three primary reasons: same-day pickup availability, audit-ready documentation, and competitive remarketing returns on eligible devices.

The KSPCB has been progressively tightening enforcement of e-waste regulations since 2022, with increased inspections of generating businesses and significant Environmental Compensation levies on non-compliant entities.

For {keyword} involving data-bearing media, the choice between software sanitisation (NIST 800-88 Purge) and physical destruction (shredding) depends on the sensitivity classification of data and the reuse value of the hardware.

Our {keyword} chain-of-custody process begins at your location with serialised asset tagging, continues through GPS-tracked transport, and concludes with individual device destruction confirmation — every step timestamped and documented.

processSteps.desc: WhatsApp or call us with your device list. We provide a firm quote and pickup slot within 1 hour for corporate clients.
Our certified logistics team arrives at your location. All devices are packed, inventoried, and sealed in tamper-evident bags.
At our facility, data-bearing media receives NIST 800-88 certified wiping or physical shredding. Each device gets its own destruction certificate.
Hardware is disassembled, sorted by material type, and processed through our certified recovery streams. Zero landfill.
You receive Form-6 manifest, Certificate of Destruction, and Environmental Impact Report — audit-ready and KSPCB-compliant.

benefits: KSPCB authorised — the only legal way to dispose of e-waste in Kerala
Free pickup for bulk collections of 10+ items
NIST 800-88 certified data destruction satisfying DPDP Act 2023
